examples: A great example of that, that vision in portraiture, is Cecilia Beaux.
All of Francoise Duparc's surviving paintings blend portraiture and genre.
Portraiture, once a luxury for the privileged few, was suddenly well within the reach of many more people.
Like so many categories of paintings, this kind of portraiture hit its market peak around 1990.
The short time between thought and execution of an idea encouraged sequential picture-taking and self-portraiture of all kinds.
